vulnerabilities.description: CORS is not fully set up with whitelist and Helmet middleware is not present.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet and configure CORS with a whitelist of allowed origins.

vulnerabilities.description: There is no rate limiting middleware implemented.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate rate limiting middleware to control request rates to the server.

vulnerabilities.description: Logging may expose sensitive information; ensure that sensitive data is not logged.
vulnerabilities.fix: Review logging configuration to exclude sensitive data such as secrets and environment variables.

vulnerabilities.description: Input sanitization and validation appear to be inadequately addressed.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement input validation and sanitization using middleware for all API endpoints.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT/OAuth2 configuration and permission checking are not examined in the provided code.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement secure JWT handling and middleware checks for permissions (RBAC/ABAC) across APIs.
